fields.name: Stabilize
fields.description: Anchor lucidity by examining your hands. Slowly turn them over, count the fingers, feel the surfaces. Returns clarity when the dream begins to fade.
fields.incantation: I am here. I am awake within the dream.

fields.name: Ground
fields.description: Touch the dream ground with your bare feet. Press through it. Sensation deepens awareness and slows premature waking.
fields.incantation: Earth beneath. Mind above. Awake between.

fields.name: Spin Anchor
fields.description: Spin in place when the dream destabilises. The vestibular shock often re-renders the scene rather than collapsing it.
fields.incantation: Round the world turns; I remain.

fields.name: Summon
fields.description: Reach into a pocket, behind your back, or under a cloth. Expect the object to be there, and it will be. Belief is the gesture.

fields.name: Reshape
fields.description: Stretch a finger, grow a sixth, fuse two together. Begin reshaping the dream with the most familiar surface — your own hands.
fields.incantation: Form is fluid. I am the sculptor.

fields.name: Passwall
fields.description: Walk through a solid surface. Soften the boundary by treating it as mist; do not slow your stride.
fields.incantation: Walls are agreements. I no longer agree.

fields.name: Transmute
fields.description: Hold a small object and watch it become another. A coin into a key, a leaf into a moth. The intermediary states matter — feel the shift.
fields.incantation: What is, becomes. What becomes, is.

fields.name: Threshold Travel
fields.description: Choose any door. Form a vivid intention of where it leads. Open with conviction. The dream reorganises beyond the frame.
fields.incantation: Beyond this door, the place I name.

fields.name: Summon Guide
fields.description: Call out, expecting a wise figure to approach. Question them. Their answers often surface knowledge the waking mind cannot.
fields.incantation: I call upon what I already know.

fields.name: Shapeshift
fields.description: Become an animal. The trick is not to imagine it; it is to remember being it. Begin with the gait, then the body.
fields.incantation: Old skin sheds. New skin remembers.

fields.name: Weather Shift
fields.description: Will the sky to change. Storm to silver light, dusk to dawn. Slowly at first; the dream's internal weather has momentum.
fields.incantation: The sky listens. I speak softly.

fields.name: Invert Gravity
fields.description: Walk up the wall. Step onto the ceiling. Reorient your sense of down. Often easier than flight, and instructive about dream logic.
fields.incantation: Down is a direction. I choose another.

fields.name: Voidwalk
fields.description: Step into the dark space between dreams. Hold your form there. Re-emerge by intending a destination — a practiced jump between scenes.
fields.incantation: Between the dreams, the dreamer waits.

fields.name: Compress Time
fields.description: Fold a long inner experience into a moment of dream-time. Useful for rehearsal, contemplation, or sustained attention work.

fields.name: Sustained Witness
fields.description: Hold lucidity until natural waking. Do not act. Simply remain — the rarest discipline. The dream becomes a long, lucid silence.
fields.incantation: I do nothing. I am everything.
